name: open-formula-1-mcp-server
description:
This project implements the MCP Server for Open Formula 1 to gather F1 race, car, driver, lap and various other information.

Open Formula 1 is an open-source API that provides real-time and historical Formula 1 data.

The API offers a wealth of information, including lap timings, car telemetry, radio communications, and more. Whether you're looking to create interactive dashboards, dive deep into race analysis, or even develop connected objects that light up every time your favorite driv...
